summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now links more directly to chapter 15's ladder descent, and one interior sentence now carries forward Prue's warning by briefly resolving the battle back into Neville and Martha before Owen forces it into abstraction again. The chapter's exit already handed cleanly into chapter 17, so no ending rewrite was needed.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to continue more directly from Owen's descent into the wall.
Added a brief callback to Neville and Martha in Owen's interior narration to sharpen the chapter-15-to-16 moral seam without changing events.
